Why A $15 US Federal Minimum Wage May Be Just Around The Corner
summary:
After decades of lagging growth, wages have finally started to climb in 2021 as a record number of U.S. jobs remain unfilled.

headline: 3 Stocks Insiders Are Selling
summary: When insiders sell shares, itindicates their concern in the company’s prospects or that they view the stockas being overpriced.
